title: The Agents Receive Their Orders
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the agents receive their orders, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Agents Receive Their Orders. The journey through the desert continues, mixing exhaustion, danger, and Vivi’s memories of the country she is trying to save. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yuba's being hit by a sand- storm!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Frankly speaking, there ain't much a difference between here and that abandoned town Elumalu!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Wasn't this supposed to be an oasis town, Vivi?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Travellers, eh?...Well then, you must be awfully tired.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Sorry to tell you folks this town's a little bit dried up right now.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But you folks still ought to rest here for the night.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We've got plenty of imns and rooms to spare... That's one of the things Yuba's known for.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Excuse me, but I heard the rebel forces were using this town as a base. Is that tr-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You have business with the rebels?

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're another bunch of degener-ates that want to join the rebels!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ahhhhhh! W-what's with this old man flipping out all of a sudden?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Are no longer in this town...!

summary: This part develops the agents receive their orders and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
